common.errorBody: Please try again. If the problem persists, contact an administrator.

home.title: An intelligent, bilingual mentorship operating system
home.subtitle: From manual, document-based mentorship to a measurable, AI-assisted programme for Dangote Group.

about.title: About the programme
about.body: A 9-month bilingual mentorship programme that takes Dangote from manual mentorship management to an intelligent, measurable system: pre-training and matching, training, goal setting, mentorship sessions, reviews, clinics, reporting, and completion.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Is the programme available in French?
faq.a1: Yes. The entire interface and your conversations are available in English and French, and you are never forced to write in English.
faq.q2: Who can I contact for help?
faq.a2: Reach out to your programme administrator from within the portal.

auth.loginSubtitle: Use your Dangote account or email and password.
auth.inviteSubtitle: Set a password to activate your account.
auth.inviteInvalid: This invitation link is invalid or has expired.

dashboard.stub: More for this area arrives in a later milestone.

admin.title: Administration
admin.noProgrammes: No programmes yet. Create the first one.
admin.confirmArchive: Archive this item? It can be restored later.

imports.title: Import data
imports.uploadHint: CSV or Excel (.xlsx) — including Google Sheets/Forms exports.
imports.name: Name
imports.blockedHint: Rows with blocking errors must be fixed before they can be accepted.

matching.title: Matching engine
matching.runHint: Scores every eligible mentor–mentee pair. Suggestions only — you approve every pair.
matching.noSuggestions: No suggestions yet. Run matching to generate them.
matching.languageRule: Language is a hard rule: EN↔EN and FR↔FR only. Cross-language pairs are impossible.
matching.noMatchYet: No match yet. Your administrator will pair you soon.

profile.title: My profile
profile.noProfile: You don't have a mentorship profile in the current cohort yet.
profile.whatCanLearn: What mentees can learn from me

people.name: Name
people.none: No profiles yet. Import data to create them.

invites.title: Invites
invites.subtitle: Create invite links for admin-created accounts. Links expire after 14 days and are shown only once.
invites.created: Invite created. Copy the link now — it will not be shown again.
invites.conflict: An active invite already exists for this email and role.
invites.adminOnly: Only a Super Admin can invite administrators.
invites.noInvites: No invites yet. Create the first one.
